anime_pulse_items.title: One Piece Chapter 1138: Luffy vs. Imu Final War Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest chapter drops the biggest bombshell in One Piece history as Luffy confronts Imu directly. The Final War arc officially kicks off with the Straw Hats and the Grand Fleet charging into Mary Geoise. Fans are buzzing about the revelation of the true history and the fate of the world.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note: New Live-Action Series Announced by Netflix
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix reveals a new Death Note live-action series set in an alternate universe, with a diverse cast and modernized take. The announcement has divided fans, with some excited and others skeptical after the 2017 film. Production starts next month.

anime_pulse_items.title: Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3: Culling Game Arc Finale Airs Tonight
anime_pulse_items.summary: The final episode of Jujutsu Kaisen Season 3 airs tonight on Crunchyroll, featuring the climax of the Culling Game arc. Yuji and Sukuna's confrontation reaches a turning point, with major character deaths expected. Fans are preparing for emotional devastation.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer Infinity Castle Movie Release Date Confirmed
anime_pulse_items.summary: The first film of the Demon Slayer Infinity Castle trilogy is set for August 2026. A new trailer shows breathtaking animation from Ufotable, teasing the final battle against Muzan. Pre-orders for tickets are breaking records.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: 'End of Eternity' Spin-off Manga Launches
anime_pulse_items.summary: A new Attack on Titan spin-off manga titled 'End of Eternity' begins serialization, exploring the aftermath of the Rumbling and the lives of surviving characters. It features original art by an assistant of Hajime Isayama. Fans are eager for more lore.

anime_pulse_items.title: My Hero Academia Manga: Final Arc Reaches Climax
anime_pulse_items.summary: The My Hero Academia manga enters its final stretch with Deku vs. All For One. Recent chapters reveal the fate of several heroes and the final form of the villain. Weekly spoilers are trending on Twitter.

anime_pulse_items.title: Chainsaw Man Season 2: First Visual and Summer 2026 Release
anime_pulse_items.summary: MAPPA unveils the first key visual for Chainsaw Man Season 2, confirming a July 2026 release. The visual features Denji and new characters from the International Assassins arc. Crunchyroll will stream it.

anime_pulse_items.title: Spy x Family Season 3 Premieres with Double Episode
anime_pulse_items.summary: Spy x Family Season 3 drops its first two episodes on Netflix and Crunchyroll simultaneously. The new arc introduces a mysterious new villain targeting the Forgers. Fans are loving the balance of action and comedy.

anime_pulse_items.title: Frieren Season 2 Announced: Production Begins
anime_pulse_items.summary: After winning Anime of the Year at the Crunchyroll Awards, Frieren: Beyond Journey's End officially gets a second season. Studio Madhouse confirms returning staff. Fans speculate on adapting the Goddess's Monument arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Solo Leveling Season 2 Episode 19: Jeju Island Raid Continues
anime_pulse_items.summary: Solo Leveling Season 2 airs its 19th episode on Crunchyroll, featuring the intense Jeju Island arc. Jin-Woo faces the Ant King in a battle that deviates slightly from the manhwa. Fans are debating the changes.

anime_pulse_items.title: Naruto/Boruto: New Boruto Chapter Reveals Kawaki's Past
anime_pulse_items.summary: The latest Boruto manga chapter delves into Kawaki's backstory, showing his childhood under Isshiki. The chapter also hints at the next stage of the Code arc. Fans are connecting dots to the timeskip.

anime_pulse_items.title: Dragon Ball: New Game 'Dragon Ball: Kakarot 2' Announced
anime_pulse_items.summary: Bandai Namco announces Dragon Ball: Kakarot 2, covering the Moro and Granolah arcs from the manga. The game will feature new gameplay mechanics and a release date of November 2026. Trailer shows Ultra Instinct Goku vs. Moro.

anime_pulse_items.title: Crunchyroll Adds 10 New Anime to Spring 2026 Lineup
anime_pulse_items.summary: Crunchyroll announces 10 new simulcast licenses for Spring 2026, including 'Kaiju No. 8' season 2 and 'Wind Breaker' season 2. The platform also confirms exclusive rights for 'The Eminence in Shadow' movie.

anime_pulse_items.title: Netflix's 'One Piece' Live-Action Season 2 Begins Filming
anime_pulse_items.summary: Netflix confirms that One Piece live-action season 2 has started filming in South Africa. New cast members for Chopper and other characters are revealed. The season is expected to cover the Arabasta arc.

anime_pulse_items.title: Reddit's r/anime Rates Best Spring 2026 Anime So Far
anime_pulse_items.summary: The r/anime community ranks the top Spring 2026 anime, with 'Frieren' leading followed by 'Jujutsu Kaisen' and 'Spy x Family'. A new survey shows 'Oshi no Ko' season 2 as the most anticipated. The thread has 15k comments.

anime_pulse_items.title: Death Note 20th Anniversary: Special Art Book Released
anime_pulse_items.summary: To celebrate Death Note's 20th anniversary, a premium art book featuring never-before-seen sketches from Takeshi Obata is released. The book also includes interviews and a short story. Fans are rushing to buy limited editions.

anime_pulse_items.title: Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba - The Hinokami Chronicles 2 Revealed
anime_pulse_items.summary: A sequel to the hit game is announced, covering the Swordsmith Village and Hashira Training arcs. It features new playable characters like Mitsuri and Muichiro. Release date set for December 2026.

anime_pulse_items.title: Attack on Titan: The Final Season Soundtrack Wins Award
anime_pulse_items.summary: Hiroyuki Sawano's soundtrack for Attack on Titan: The Final Season wins 'Best Soundtrack' at the 2026 Anime Music Awards. The award reignites discussions about the series' impact. Sawano hints at new music for a future project.
